name: gemineye
description: A sandboxed second opinion from Gemini — review-only. Eight subcommands: review, megareview, wip, sanity, name, compare, save, harvest. Gemini proposes edits as code blocks; Claude applies them. harvest extracts 5 durable bullets from any file (transcript, doc, code) — the manual surface for the same pattern adjudant uses automatically at PreCompact. Pairs with adjudant for vault context.
